name: marcattacks
description: A powerful streaming MARC21 to RDF converter with JSONata, Catmandu Fix transformation and S3 support.

scripts.demo:rdf:messages: npx marcattacks --info --to multipart --map marcinrdf --param header="@version \"1.1-messages\"." --param delimiter="@message." --param noStartDelimiter=true --param noEndDelimiter=true --param parse=text:flat ./data/sample.xml
scripts.demo:fix: npx marcattacks --to jsonl --map fix --param fix=./demo/example.fix data/sample.xml
scripts.demo:fix:rdf: npx marcattacks --to jsonl --to rdf --map fix --param fix=./demo/marc2rdf.fix data/sample.xml
scripts.demo:workers: npx marcattacks --to jsonl --to rdf --param fix=./demo/marc2rdf.jsonata --workers 4 --info data/sample.xml
scripts.demo:slowmap: npx marcattacks --map ./plugin/slowmap.js --param spin_ms=10 --workers auto --to jsonl --info data/sample.xml
scripts.demo:biblio: npx marcattacks --info --from json --to multipart --fix ./demo/biblio.jsonata --param header="@version \"1.1-messages\"." --param delimiter="@message." --param noStartDelimiter=true --param noEndDelimiter=true ./data/biblio.json
scripts.docker:run: docker run --rm -v `pwd`/data:/app/data -it hochstenbach/marcattacks:v0.0.1 --to rdf --map rdf data/sample.xml
scripts.postversion: npm publish && git push && git push --tags
